form.formComment: Resuming after a four-and-a-half months break. Finished off last preparation second of 9 at Chelmsford December 4 over 1600m, 0.8 len behind Symbol Of Majesty with 58kg at $3.80. On debut fourth of 11 at this track November 1 over 1400m, 4.5 len behind Zooming with 58kg at $41. Has ability and is sure to have come on over the break.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(7). Resuming after a four-and-a-half months break. Finished off last preparation second of 9 at Chelmsford December 4 over 1600m, 0.8 len behind Symbol Of Majesty with 58kg at $3.80. On debut fourth of 11 at this track November 1 over 1400m, 4.5 len behind Zooming with 58kg at $41. Has ability and is sure to have come on over the break.

form.formComment: First-starter by Dubawi out of Stylistique. Can measure up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First-starter by Dubawi out of Stylistique. Can measure up.

form.formComment: First-starter by Expert Eye out of Sea Of Marmoon. The betting is the best pointer to her chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First-starter by Expert Eye out of Sea Of Marmoon. The betting is the best pointer to her chances.

form.formComment: Is first-up after a break of six months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last campaign fifth of 7 at Deauville in the G3 Prix Des Reservoirs October 20 over 1600m, soft track; 2.75 len behind Rhiyanna carrying 56kg at $2.70. First up last campaign second of 8 at Newmarket (July) August 8 over 1600m, 1.0 len behind Evolutionist carrying 58kg at $15. Rates highly.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-5). Is first-up after a break of six months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last campaign fifth of 7 at Deauville in the G3 Prix Des Reservoirs October 20 over 1600m, soft track; 2.75 len behind Rhiyanna carrying 56kg at $2.70. First up last campaign second of 8 at Newmarket (July) August 8 over 1600m, 1.0 len behind Evolutionist carrying 58kg at $15. Rates highly.

form.formComment: Resumes racing after a long spell. Only one run when 7th of 11 at this track on November 1 over 1400m, 7 len behind Zooming with 58kg at $17. Prefer to see how she has returned.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(4). Resumes racing after a long spell. Only one run when 7th of 11 at this track on November 1 over 1400m, 7 len behind Zooming with 58kg at $17. Prefer to see how she has returned.

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell after only one run when 3rd of 10 at Chelmsford on November 27 over 1400m, neck behind Pierchic with 58kg at $1.60. Rates highly on debut run and expected to measure up here.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(10.5). Resumes from a spell after only one run when 3rd of 10 at Chelmsford on November 27 over 1400m, neck behind Pierchic with 58kg at $1.60. Rates highly on debut run and expected to measure up here.

form.formComment: First-starter by Dark Angel out of Futoon. Worth watching for a betting move.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First-starter by Dark Angel out of Futoon. Worth watching for a betting move.

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell. Finished off last preparation fifth of 8 at Wolverhampton October 28 over 1740m, 5.5 len behind Tryst with 58kg at $4.50. On debut fourth of 8 at this track September 27 over 1400m, 3 len behind Golden Orbit carrying 58kg at $12. Wait and see how she returns.
